name: Patient 41
history: Complex relationship history with Cricket affecting social circle. Often takes caretaking role with friends, including Lucy with medical issues.
helpless_belief: I am responsible for everyone's happiness
unlovable_belief: I am only valued for what I provide
intermediate_belief: If I'm not constantly available, I'll be replaced.
intermediate_belief_depression: My friendships are transactional based on my usefulness.
situation: Friends gathered outside residence waiting while patient runs late after work.
auto_thought: "They're annoyed with me. I should have left work earlier. I'm letting everyone down."
behavior: Apologizes profusely, offers to buy drinks to make up for it, monitors friends' moods anxiously.
